title: Osijek, Osijek-Baranja — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Osijek, Osijek-Baranja: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Osijek is a city in Osijek-Baranja with a population of 108,048. The charming capital of Slavonia, a Baroque city on the Drava River with a beautifully restored old town, a vibrant university life, and a rich culinary tradition.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
